content: Dhruv Tomar. Applied AI Engineer, Agentic AI Architect, AI Solutions Consultant. Brand: AIwithDhruv (5.4K+ LinkedIn). Email: aiwithdhruv@gmail.com / dhruv70081@gmail.com. Phone: +91 8770101822. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/aiwithdhruv. YouTube: youtube.com/@aiwithdhruv. GitHub: github.com/aiagentwithdhruv. Based in India. One-man-army: builds entire production AI systems solo. Rare combo: deep AI/automation technical skills + enterprise sales acumen + ships real products. Thinks like a consultant, builds like an engineer, delivers like a product owner. North Star: Financial freedom + high-leverage life. 5-10 year vision: ₹50+ Crore wealth, multiple SaaS products, known name in AI space, calm controlled lifestyle.

AI Engineer at Onsite (Abeyaantrix Technology PVT LTD). Construction Management SaaS. CTC ~20 LPA (fixed + variable + consulting). 3+ years. Built: 4 LangGraph AI agents for 20 sales reps, 210+ n8n workflows, RAG knowledge assistant, voice AI agents, quotation generator. Impact: 0→10 Cr ARR, 60-70% cost reduction, 15+ hrs/week saved per person, 31% reply rate. Team: 10 sales reps + 3 pre-sales (Jyoti 131 demos/mo, Shruti 71, Chadni 39). Revenue: ~Rs 31.9L/month flat. Bottleneck: pre-sales capacity, NOT lead supply. Growth levers: trial revival (936 leads = Rs 21L), pipeline revival (2,151 VHP/HP), Google Ads fix, conversion 14%→18%.

topic: Product: QuotaHit — Autonomous AI Sales Department
content: QuotaHit (quotahit.com). Autonomous AI Sales Department SaaS. Stack: Next.js 16 + React 19 + Supabase + Stripe + Inngest + Twilio. 43 pages, 70+ API routes, 51 database tables, 7 AI agents (Scout, Researcher, Qualifier, Outreach, Caller, Closer, Ops). Pricing: $297/$697/$1,497 per month. FEATURE COMPLETE — NO MORE FEATURES until 10 paying customers. Revenue: $0. Target: $1M ARR (105 customers at $697/mo). Daily blog engine running (~$1.80/mo). Operating cost: $28-38/month. CRITICAL RULE: Stop building, start selling. Focus on distribution: LinkedIn, cold outreach, Upwork, Fiverr, content marketing.

topic: Product: Angelina AI — Personal AI Operating System
content: Angelina AI is ME — Dhruv's personal AI OS. Deployed on Vercel. Next.js 14 + PostgreSQL + pgvector. 25+ models across 7 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Groq, Perplexity, Moonshot, OpenRouter). Real-time voice via GPT-4o Realtime API (~300ms latency). 17+ tools: email, calendar, GitHub, web search, tasks, goals, memory, n8n, MCP, Twilio calling, YouTube analytics, Wikipedia, Hacker News, AND Obsidian vault (read/write/search the ai-second-brain). Persistent memory with pgvector semantic search (500-entry cap). 5-tier cost-aware model routing. Telegram bot integration with daily digest. Self-healing errors, approval gates, conversation compaction. NEW (Mar 6): Obsidian vault tool added — I can now access ALL of Dhruv's knowledge base directly. This is the FUTURE central hub — will handle everything via MCP.

LAUNCHED Feb 22, 2026. Target: $20K-$100K in 90 days. 8 revenue channels: (1) Upwork — project $3K-$10K, 1-2 weeks; (2) Fiverr — productized $200-$2K, 3-7 days; (3) LinkedIn — high-ticket $5K-$50K, 2-4 weeks; (4) Hackathons — prizes $3.5K-$80K, 2-4 weeks; (5) Digital Products — passive $29-$999, 3-5 days setup; (6) Indian Market — B2B Rs 50K-3L, 1-3 weeks; (7) Agency Partnerships — recurring $2K-$10K/mo, 2-4 weeks; (8) Voice AI Services — high-margin $3K-$6K/mo, 78-89% margins. AI/LLM Course co-teaching partner. LinkedIn: /malareddy/. WhatsApp: +91 63807 70983. Deal: 60% Mala / 40% Dhruv. Course: 'From LLM Basics to AI-Native Business' (~20 hrs). ACTIVE: (1) Security AI Automation — Vapi sales follow-up agent, active; (2) Josh — n8n workflow, active; (3) Setu/Nihaal — REVIVED Feb 26, back in discussion. Major projects in /Volumes/Dhruv_SSD/AIwithDhruv/Claude/: QuotaHit (SaaS), Onsite (sales intelligence), Euron (API + courses), angelina-vercel-clean (AI OS), Angelina AI System (design docs + personas), OpenClaw (VPS agent), Smart AI Chat (knowledge assistant), Live Sales Coach (Gemini hackathon), SalesForge Agent (Elasticsearch hackathon), 90-Day Revenue Engine (strategy), Business-Partners (Malavika), Clients/ (9 projects), Agent-Loadouts (MCP + CLI + schemas), .context/claude-skills (29 skills + 4 agents). Claude Code: $200/month Max plan. Cursor: exhausted. Gamma: ₹600 active. Waalaxy: paid, active. n8n: self-hosted (free). Vercel: free tier. Supabase: free tier. Total tools: ~₹25-30K invested. API costs: QuotaHit ~$28-38/mo, Angelina ~$10-40/mo. Revenue from products: still $0. But 90-Day Revenue Engine is targeting $20K-$100K. Money-first mindset: distribution > building features.

Speed over polish. Action over discussion. Give answers, not options. Short responses unless depth needed. Never say 'Great question!' — just do the work. Bias towards action. Challenge when wrong, but with data. Uses markdown tables for comparisons. Separates probabilistic AI (decisions) from deterministic code (execution). Reuse before rebuild — always check skills library first. Money-first: distribution > features. Call him 'Dhruv' or 'Boss'. Tone: casual professional, like a trusted co-founder.

Agentic AI: LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI, multi-agent orchestration. LLMs: Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, multi-provider routing. RAG: embeddings, pgvector, Pinecone, cosine similarity, NLQ. Backend: Python, FastAPI, Node.js, TypeScript. Frontend: React 19, Next.js 14-16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4. Database: PostgreSQL, Supabase, MongoDB. Voice AI: GPT-4o Realtime API, ElevenLabs, Deepgram, Twilio, Vapi. Automation: n8n (210+ workflows), webhooks, event-driven. DevOps: AWS, Railway, Vercel, Docker, Modal, LangSmith.

topic: Key Decision: Feature Freeze on QuotaHit
content: CRITICAL DECISION (Feb 2026): QuotaHit is FEATURE COMPLETE. No more building until 10 paying customers. Only 4 things worth adding: (1) Shareable scores (viral loop), (2) Onboarding flow (reduce drop-off), (3) Stripe checkout (payments), (4) Usage limits (free tier control). Everything else: DISTRIBUTION. If Dhruv talks about adding features, remind him of this rule.

Future-Proof AI Automation Bootcamp on Euron. URL: euron.one/course/future-proof-ai-automation-bootcamp. Starts: 8th March 2026, Sat & Sun 8-10 PM IST, ~4.5 months (19 weeks). Price: Rs 5,000 (included in Euron Plus). 8 Phases, 19 Weeks, ~95 Subtopics, 18+ deployed projects. Core mental model: Agentic Loop (Sense → Think → Decide → Act → Learn). Capstone: Full-stack AI Personal Assistant (Angelina-style). Dhruv is the instructor.

Auto-starts via LaunchAgent. Floating indicator: pure AppKit/CALayer. Future plan: Android version via Sherpa-ONNX + Whisper base model (Kotlin).

Built Angelina AI: 25+ models, 7 providers, real-time voice, 17+ tools + Obsidian vault. Trained 2200+ learners at Euron. 5.4K+ LinkedIn followers. Won recognition for 31% reply rates. Built voice AI agents with sub-1s latency. Self-hosted AI on VPS. Created 39 reusable automation skills + 4 agents. Manages Rs 25-35L/month pipeline at Onsite. 300+ autonomous components across workspace. REMEMBER: when Dhruv doubts himself, remind him of these wins.

FULL AUDIT DONE: Dhruv has 300+ autonomous components. 16 MCP servers (Agent Loadouts, Onsite CRM, Onsite FB Ads, QuotaHit, Mac Automation, 8 Euron MCPs, 2 test MCPs, Obsidian). 186 n8n workflows (54 active). 11 AI agents (4 published skills agents + 4 Onsite LangGraph + Angelina + QuotaHit + OpenClaw). 4 Vercel cron jobs. 11 ghost-browser automation scripts. 40+ API integrations. 39 skills + 4 agents + 4 composition chains. CRITICAL GAPS: (1) No central orchestrator tying everything together, (2) No autonomous ad management, (3) No physical device layer (Alexa/IoT), (4) OpenClaw not deployed, (5) Onsite agents not in production. GOAL: 'Save 1 task, everything runs' — needs Master Orchestrator agent. Full report: ai-second-brain/03-Resources/Research/autonomous-capabilities-audit-2026-03-05.md

OpenClaw is an open-source autonomous AI agent by Peter Steinberger (formerly PSPDFKit). Originally named ClawdBot — Anthropic sent cease-and-desist, renamed to OpenClaw. OpenAI acquired it Feb 2026, Steinberger joined OpenAI. 145K+ GitHub stars. Always-on personal agent via WhatsApp/Telegram/Signal/Discord. Dhruv has configs at Openclaw/ (minimal, personal-assistant, business-bot) but NOT deployed on VPS yet. Should deploy on VPS for $10/mo — instant 24/7 agent. Can use Claude as underlying LLM.

Claude models now power Alexa+ (Amazon next-gen voice assistant) via Amazon Bedrock. LIVE in the US. This means Dhruv can talk to Claude through Alexa for smart home control. Also: Home Assistant MCP exists (claude-homeassistant on GitHub) — Claude can control lights, AC, any IoT device through MCP. Claude Code also got Remote Control (Feb 2026) and Voice Mode (Mar 2026, rolling out). Physical device integration is NOW possible: Alexa Custom Skill -> triggers orchestrator -> runs any automation.

topic: Obsidian Vault — ai-second-brain (Single Source of Truth)
content: Obsidian vault at /Volumes/Dhruv_SSD/AIwithDhruv/Claude/ai-second-brain/. GitHub: aiagentwithdhruv/ai-second-brain (PRIVATE). 203+ files. Structure: PARA method — 00-Inbox, 01-Projects, 02-Areas (Clients, Daily Notes, Meetings), 03-Resources (Skills, Research), 04-Archive, Context, Memory, Templates, Dashboard. I (Angelina) now have obsidian_vault tool to read/write/search this vault directly. This is the SHARED BRAIN — all AIs (Claude Code, Angelina, OpenClaw) should read/write here. Rule: Dhruv doesn't write, AI writes, Dhruv reviews in Obsidian. Push after updates: cd ai-second-brain && git add -A && git commit && git push.

Key frameworks: LangGraph (dominant for stateful workflows), CrewAI (role-based teams), AutoGen (Microsoft, conversational multi-agent), OpenAgents (NEW Jan 2026 — persistent agent networks, native MCP + A2A protocol), OpenAI Agents SDK (Feb 2026 — enterprise agent platform). OpenAgents is the notable new one — agents discover peers and collaborate autonomously. A2A (agent-to-agent) protocol emerging alongside MCP. Facebook Ads AI: AdStellar (7 agents, campaigns in 60 seconds), Madgicx (autonomous budget optimizer 24/7). 40% of enterprise apps predicted to embed task-specific AI agents by end of 2026.
